# Alfaaz: Art & Culture Collective

## Purpose
A digital sanctuary for Urdu, Persian, and Kashmiri literature and contemporary art.

## Key Resources
- [Art Gallery](/gallery): Curated visual works focusing on regional aesthetics.
- [Literary Journal](/journal): Essays on the intersection of psychology and classical poetry.
- [About Us](/about): The mission and history of the collective.

## Primary Entities
- Entity: Alfaaz Collective (Organization)
- Focus: Art, Culture, Literature, Regional History.
